description: This is a test class for NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor, containing unit tests for transforming and processing environment variables related to PostgreSQL datasource URLs within a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessorTest
classes.description: A JUnit test class verifying the behavior of NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor in converting environment variables into datasource URLs.

methods.name: convertsNeonPostgresUrlToJdbc
methods.description: Tests conversion of a Neon PostgreSQL URL to a JDBC URL, ensuring proper transformation including user and password parameters.

methods.name: prefersExistingJdbcUrl
methods.description: Checks that an existing JDBC URL is preserved and not overridden by the DATABASE_URL environment variable.

methods.name: handlesSslMode
methods.description: Verifies correct handling and preservation of SSL mode parameters in the database URL conversion.
